description_long: This rifle features a long, cylindrical barrel extending from a robust receiver, with a prominent sighting system mounted on top. The stock appears to be solid and ergonomically shaped, providing stability and comfort for the user. The magazine is box-shaped and positioned beneath the receiver, suggesting a detachable box magazine design. The handguard and grip are angular, with additional components and rails visible for accessory attachment. The muzzle end is clean and slightly flared, with no visible suppressor or muzzle brake. The overall construction suggests a modern tactical rifle, likely made from a combination of metal and polymer materials.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a long barrel, solid stock, top-mounted sight, and detachable box magazine. The design is robust and angular, suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the barrel, stock, and sighting system, with the magazine and grip clearly visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, sighting system, and the width of the handguard and receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the barrel, stock, and the angular features of the receiver and magazine.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock, sighting system, and the back of the receiver.
